title: phyllanthus graveolens var. tenellus
intro: Phyllanthus graveolens var. tenellus, also known as the small-leaved phyllanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of certain skin conditions. The small-leaved phyllanthus can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
